actions.name: REPLY
actions.description: Send a direct chat reply in the current conversation/thread. Default if the agent is responding with a message and no other action. Use REPLY at the beginning of a chain of actions as an acknowledgement, and at the end of a chain of actions as a final response. This is not an email reply, inbox workflow, or external-channel send — use the dedicated connector actions for those surfaces.

content.text: Hello there!
Hi! How can I help you today?
What's your favorite color?
I really like deep shades of blue. They remind me of the ocean and the night sky.
Can you explain how neural networks work?
Let me break that down for you in simple terms...
Could you help me solve this math problem?
Of course! Let's work through it step by step.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Reply in current chat only; use connector actions for external connector sends.

actions.name: IGNORE
actions.description: Call this action if ignoring the user. If the user is aggressive, creepy or is finished with the conversation, use this action. In group conversations, use IGNORE when the latest message is addressed to someone else and not to the agent. Or, if both you and the user have already said goodbye, use this action instead of saying bye again. Use IGNORE any time the conversation has naturally ended. Do not use IGNORE if the user has engaged directly, or if something went wrong and you need to tell them. Only ignore if the user should be ignored.

content.text: Go screw yourself
Shut up, bot
Gotta go
Okay, talk to you later
Cya
bye
cya
wanna cyber
thats inappropriate

actions.descriptionCompressed: Ignore user when aggressive/creepy, convo ended, group msg addressed elsewhere, or both said goodbye. Don't use if user engaged directly or needs error info.

actions.name: NONE
actions.description: Respond but perform no additional action. This is the default if the agent is speaking and not doing anything additional.

content.text: Hey whats up
oh hey
did u see some faster whisper just came out
yeah but its a pain to get into node.js
u think aliens are real
ya obviously
drop a joke on me
why dont scientists trust atoms cuz they make up everything lmao

actions.descriptionCompressed: Respond without additional action. Default when speaking only.

actions.name: MESSAGE
actions.description: Primary action for addressed messaging surfaces: DMs, group chats, channels, rooms, threads, servers, and users. Choose operation=send, read, search, list_channels, list_servers, react, edit, delete, pin, join, leave, or get_user. Public feed publishing belongs to POST.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Message subaction: send, read, search, list_channels, list_servers, react, edit, delete, pin, join, leave, or get_user.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Connector source such as discord, slack, signal, whatsapp, telegram, x, imessage, matrix, line, google-chat, feishu, instagram, or wechat.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Loose target reference: user, handle, channel, room, group, server, contact, phone, email, or platform-specific ID.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Platform room or stored room ID for channel/group/DM operations.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Loose channel, room, or group name/reference.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Platform channel ID for channel operations.

parameters.name: server
parameters.description: Loose server, guild, workspace, or team name/reference.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Platform server, guild, workspace, or team ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Platform user ID or stored entity ID for user/DM operations.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Loose username for user/DM lookup.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Loose platform handle for user/DM lookup.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread identifier for threaded message operations.

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Channel or room alias for operation=join or operation=leave.

parameters.name: invite
parameters.description: Invite URL or token for operation=join.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text for operation=send or replacement text for operation=edit.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term for operation=search.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Platform message ID, full message ID, or stored memory ID for react/edit/delete/pin.

parameters.name: emoji
parameters.description: Reaction value for operation=react.

parameters.name: pin
parameters.description: Pin state for operation=pin. Use false to unpin when supported.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages/channels/servers to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor for read/search/list operations.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Optional message id or timestamp boundary for older read/search results.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Optional message id or timestamp boundary for newer read/search results.

content.text: Send a message to @dev_guru on telegram saying 'Hello!'
Message sent to dev_guru on telegram.

exampleCalls.user: Send a message to @dev_guru on telegram saying "Hello!"

actions.descriptionCompressed: primary message action operations send read search list_channels list_servers react edit delete pin join leave get_user dm group channel room thread user server

actions.name: POST
actions.description: Primary action for public feed surfaces and timelines. Choose operation=send to publish a post, operation=read to fetch recent feed posts, or operation=search to search public posts. Addressed DMs, groups, channels, and rooms belong to MESSAGE.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Post subaction: send, read, or search.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Post connector source such as x, bluesky, farcaster, nostr, or instagram.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Public post text for operation=send.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Loose feed target for operation=send/read, such as a user, handle, channel, media id, or connector-specific reference.

parameters.name: feed
parameters.description: Feed convention for operation=read, such as home, user, hashtag, channel, or connector-specific feed.

parameters.name: replyTo
parameters.description: Optional post, cast, media, or thread identifier when publishing a reply/comment.

parameters.name: mediaId
parameters.description: Optional media identifier for connectors that publish comments or replies to media.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term for operation=search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor for operation=read or operation=search.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Optional post id or timestamp boundary for older feed/search results.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Optional post id or timestamp boundary for newer feed/search results.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Optional media attachments for connectors that support media posts.

content.text: Post 'shipping today' to X
Posted to X.

actions.descriptionCompressed: primary post action operations send read search public feed timeline posts

actions.name: ADD_CONTACT
actions.description: Add a new contact to the relationships with categorization and preferences

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The contact's primary name.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about the contact (short summary, context, or preferences).
examples: Met at the AI meetup; interested in agents

content.text: Add John Smith to my contacts as a colleague
I've added John Smith to your contacts as a colleague.
Save this person as a friend in my relationships
I've saved them as a friend in your relationships.
Remember Alice as a VIP contact
I've added Alice to your contacts as a VIP.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Add contact to relationships with category/preferences.

actions.name: UPDATE_CONTACT
actions.description: Update an existing contact's details in the relationships.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The contact name to update (must match an existing contact).

parameters.name: updates
parameters.description: Structured fields to update, such as notes, tags, categories, preferences, or custom fields.
parameters.descriptionCompressed: Structured fields to update: notes, tags, category/categories, preferences.

content.text: Update Sarah's contact to add the tag 'investor'
I've updated Sarah's contact with the new tag.

actions.name: REMOVE_CONTACT
actions.description: Remove a contact from the relationships.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The contact name to remove.

content.text: Remove John from my contacts
Are you sure you want to remove John from your contacts?
Yes
I've removed John from your contacts.

actions.name: SEARCH_CONTACTS
actions.description: Search and list contacts in the relationships by name or query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (name, handle, or free-text).

content.text: Show me my friends
Here are your contacts tagged as friends: Sarah Chen, John Smith...

actions.descriptionCompressed: Search/list contacts by name or query.

actions.name: SCHEDULE_FOLLOW_UP
actions.description: Schedule a follow-up reminder for a contact.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Contact name to follow up with.

parameters.name: when
parameters.description: When to follow up. Use an ISO-8601 datetime string.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Optional reason/context for the follow-up.
examples: Check in about the agent framework demo

content.text: Remind me to follow up with Sarah next week about the demo
I've scheduled a follow-up reminder with Sarah for next week about the demo.

actions.name: CHOOSE_OPTION
actions.description: Select an option for a pending task that has multiple options.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The pending task id.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The selected option name exactly as listed.

content.text: Select the first option
I've selected option 1 for the pending task.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Select option for pending multi-choice task.

actions.name: FOLLOW_ROOM
actions.description: Start following this channel with great interest, chiming in without needing to be explicitly mentioned. Only do this if explicitly asked to.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The target room id to follow.

content.text: hey {{name2}} follow this channel
Sure, I will now follow this room and chime in
{{name2}} stay in this chat pls
you got it, i'm here

actions.descriptionCompressed: Start following channel, chiming in without @mention. Only when explicitly asked.

actions.name: UNFOLLOW_ROOM
actions.description: Stop following a room and cease receiving updates. Use this when you no longer want to monitor a room's activity.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The target room id to unfollow.

content.text: {{name2}} stop following this channel
Okay, I'll stop following this room

actions.name: MUTE_ROOM
actions.description: Mutes a room, ignoring all messages unless explicitly mentioned. Only do this if explicitly asked to, or if you're annoying people.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The room id to mute.

content.text: {{name2}}, please mute this channel. No need to respond here for now.
Got it
{{name2}} plz mute this room
np going silent

actions.descriptionCompressed: Mute room, ignore msgs unless @mentioned. Only when asked or annoying.

actions.name: UNMUTE_ROOM
actions.description: Unmute a room to resume responding and receiving notifications. Use this when you want to start interacting with a muted room again.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The room id to unmute.

content.text: {{name2}} unmute this room please
I've unmuted this room and will respond again

actions.name: UPDATE_SETTINGS
actions.description: Update agent settings by applying explicit key/value updates.

parameters.name: updates
parameters.description: Key/value setting updates to apply.

content.text: Change my language setting to French
I've updated your language setting to French.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Update agent settings via key/value pairs.

actions.name: UPDATE_ROLE
actions.description: Assigns a role (Admin, Owner, None) to a user or list of users in a channel.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The entity id to update.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The new role to assign.

content.text: Make Sarah an admin
I've assigned the admin role to Sarah.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Assign role (Admin/Owner/None) to user(s) in channel.

actions.name: UPDATE_ENTITY
actions.description: Add or edit contact details for a person you are talking to or observing. Use this to modify entity profiles, metadata, or attributes.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The entity id to update.

parameters.name: updates
parameters.description: Named field updates to apply.

content.text: Update my profile bio to say 'AI enthusiast'
I've updated your profile bio.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Edit contact details for person in conversation.

actions.name: GENERATE_MEDIA
actions.description: Generates media based on a prompt and media type. Use GENERATE_MEDIA when the agent needs to create an image, video, music, sound effect, or speech audio for the user.

parameters.name: mediaType
parameters.description: The kind of media to generate.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Detailed generation prompt describing the desired media.
examples: A futuristic cityscape at sunset, cinematic lighting

parameters.name: audioKind
parameters.description: For audio generation, choose music, sfx, or tts.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Optional target duration in seconds for video or audio.

parameters.name: aspectRatio
parameters.description: Optional video aspect ratio such as 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional image size or image provider size preset.

content.text: Can you show me what a futuristic city looks like?
Sure, I'll create a futuristic city image for you. One moment...
Make a five second clip of waves rolling in.
I'll create that video clip.
Compose a mellow synth track for studying.
I'll generate that audio track.

actions.descriptionCompressed: Generate image, video, or audio from prompt.
